## What & why

Describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue (e.g. `Closes #123`).

## How it was tested

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes (Docker running for testcontainers)
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Added an Alembic migration if the schema changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out — trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots for UI changes.
